response.original_title: တစ်ချက်ခုပ် နှစ်ချက်ပြတ်
response.overview: The story follows the idea of the Myanmar proverb, “Killing two birds with one stone.” The main character fights against ruthless gangs who hold grudges against him while also protecting the person he loves. These conflicts are portrayed through intense action sequences and dramatic confrontations.  The protagonist, played by Kyaw Hein, is an honest man who works hard to build his life and support his family and loved one. However, he unexpectedly becomes involved in a conflict with local gangster groups.  When the gangsters begin targeting and trying to harm his lover, Sanda, the protagonist can no longer remain silent. He decides to stand up and fight back against them.
response.title: Kill Two Birds with One Stone
